g.title: vandelay.queued_bib_record:queue->vandelay.bib_queue:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (queue) REFERENCES vandelay.bib_queue(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: vandelay.queued_bib_record:bib_source->config.bib_source:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (bib_source) REFERENCES config.bib_source(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: vandelay.queued_bib_record:imported_as->biblio.record_entry:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (imported_as) REFERENCES biblio.record_entry(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: vandelay.queued_bib_record:import_error->vandelay.import_error:code
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (import_error) REFERENCES vandelay.import_error(code) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE SET NULL DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: vandelay.import_item:record->vandelay.queued_bib_record:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (record) REFERENCES vandelay.queued_bib_record(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: acq.lineitem:queued_record->vandelay.queued_bib_record:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (queued_record) REFERENCES vandelay.queued_bib_record(id) ON DELETE SET NULL DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: vandelay.bib_match:queued_record->vandelay.queued_bib_record:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (queued_record) REFERENCES vandelay.queued_bib_record(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: vandelay.queued_bib_record_attr:record->vandelay.queued_bib_record:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (record) REFERENCES vandelay.queued_bib_record(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
